programs.title: Barbie: Dreamhouse Adventures
programs.desc: When they get into a fight, Barbie volunteers to swap rooms with her sisters Skipper and Stacie. Eventually all of the Roberts sisters learn no roommate is perfect.

programs.title: Theatre Dome
programs.desc: Welcome to the TheatreDome where two teams are battling for eternal acting glory! After some bad math skills, our players learn a new yoga pose! Will it impress or have they poorly miscalculated?

programs.title: Lego Dreamzzz
programs.desc: The dream chasers hunt for Lunia's hourglass, which they believe will help them defeat the evil Dreamsmasher.

programs.title: The Nanny
programs.desc: Fran accidently brings a foreign woman's baby home from the subway and is accused of kidnapping.

programs.title: The Nanny
programs.desc: Fran has to pose as Ms Babcock to get an investor interested in Maxwell's next play.

programs.title: The Addams Family
programs.desc: The daughter of a family friend from Spain arrives with marriage on her mind.
